DEPT 7. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER:M.NORMAN. CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL. COUNSEL FOR DEFT NOT PRESENT. PLTF PRESENTED PRIMA FACIE CASE. COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR PLTFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR $4951.00 PRINCIPAL, $1450.55 INTEREST, $120.00 COSTS, AND $660 ATNYS FEES. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN AND RETURNED TO PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. NEAR CONCLUSION OF TRIAL, OFFICE OF COUNSEL FOR DEFT PHONED COURTROOM TO STATE THAT MR. DELISIO COULD NOT APPEAR DUE TO SCHEDULE CONFLICT AND WAS AWARE THAT DEFAULT JUDGMENT WOULD BE ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIFTH AVENUE GALLERIES, INC. $4,951.00 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,450.55 INTEREST, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,181.55
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
